name: Hearts of Artichoke with Dip #8
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend egg yolks and milk until foamy.
2. Roll artichokes in flour, then in egg milk mixture, and finally in bread crumbs.
3. Deep fry at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes, or until golden brown.
4. Sauce: Mix mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, sour cream, lemon juice, and paprika together.
5. Serve with deep-fried artichoke hearts.
